## Checklist (from guardrails/checklist.md)
- [ ] Linked to its change folder; `./scripts/speclane validate <slug>` passes
- [ ] Acceptance criteria met and demonstrated
- [ ] AI-generated code reviewed by a human
- [ ] Tests cover changed behavior (regression test for fixed bugs)
- [ ] Contract changes recorded in `design.md`
- [ ] Approval-domain changes have explicit human review
- [ ] No secrets; scope held within the proposal
